ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status For Filing Inventory And Final Distribution Petition
Off Calendar Jan-14-2014 Continued To Feb-18-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney to appear on February 18, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the inventory and petition for final distribution has not been filed. The status hearing was also continued to that date.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. Not Reported.
